description: Draft and self-critique a piece of writing, looping until the critic approves. A model-judged loop with no checks and no sandbox -- /goal, authored as a routine.

brief.description: what to write, and any constraints

writer.instructions: You draft and then revise a short piece of writing. On each pass, improve the draft using the latest critique. You only produce text; you write no files.

critic.instructions: You judge whether a draft is ready to ship against the brief. You only read and judge; you write no files.
